step1_independent_method_instances.note: Independently enumerated from experiments/linear_a_foundry BEFORE reading P1. 23 distinct verdict-bearing / infrastructure instances found; identical set to P1's FND-01..FND-23. No omitted instance.

conflict_1_corpus_multiple.detail: FND-07 (WP3.2b substitution) corpus_multiple_needed=1.7 vs FND-14 (WP5.2 C/V seed bootstrap) LA_corpus_multiple=4.9 (kv=3). Different channels, never reconciled to one figure. FINAL_CAMPAIGN_REPORT §4 + headline foreground 1.7x (most favorable); CAMPAIGN.md lab line quotes a third figure (~1.9x). P1 flags this in STATUS_CONTRADICTIONS + FND-07/FND-14 cross-notes.

conflict_2_nonmonotone_wp5.2.detail: kv=3 curve: 300=0.7747, 539=0.647, 750=0.6686, 1000=0.674, 1500=0.6941, 2000=0.6804(DROP), 3500=0.721, 6000=0.7444, 10000=0.7563, 13562=0.752(DROP, n_effective_draws=1). Non-monotone at low end AND within the 539-13562 region P1 calls 'monotone'. Crossing 0.70 (2620wf) is interpolated across a noisy non-monotone curve; the 13562 anchor is a single draw.

conflict_3_anchor_independence_n26.detail: wp5_anchor_inventory.json summary: dependency_tier_counts multi_channel_independent=26, structural_only=31, one_toponym_deep_pin=3, weak_lexical_only=1, no_anchor=1; n_held_out_survivable_candidate=26. BUT same JSON's frozen_empirical_held_out (frozen crossscript gate, DOIs 21168887/21173639) = REFUTE_LOTO_FRAGILE, recovered_signs_LOTO=[I,RI] only, each one-toponym-deep. Report headline '115 records/62 signs' + '26 independent' masks that only 2 survive held-out. ~13x optimism between nominal-independent and held-out-survivable. P1 flags (FND-12 CONFLICTING).

supersession_position_and_seed.detail: position->C/V (FND-02/04/10) and reduced-seed propagation (FND-13/14/18) are correctly marked LATER REFUTED/SUPERSEDED. Verified the refuting artifact EXISTS on branch research/linear-a-relative-phonology-seals: commit 3c1ddab 'WP-A -> CV_ANALOGUE_REFUTED (refutes my own prior Foundry C1 position pillar)'; b20ee39 'seed-propagation is a 3rd Foundry correction'; the refutation is quantified (relative-phonology D3: pure-frequency AUC 0.872 > seeded 0.784). MINOR: P1's per-row METHOD_INSTANCES.csv cites only '(task note)' for these refutations, underselling its own STATUS_CONTRADICTIONS/LINEAGES rows which DO cite the real WP-A/D3 artifacts.

step2_per_row_verification.note: PRIOR_THEOREM_OVERSTATED formal theorem + atlas present; the '92!->5!*87! (~1e9x)' order figure is correctly labelled REPORT_ONLY/illustrative; supersession note correctly scopes: formal theorem stands, empirical position leg later refuted.
AUC 0.744, perm p=0.035, LA A(0.43)/I(0.20)/U(0.18) all match data/wp1_symmetry_break.json exactly. LATER-REFUTED marking correct (relative-phonology WP-A).
atlas present; correctly marked PROPOSED_ONLY scaffold, not a verdict-bearing test (not counted as a LA result).

cv_auc_7fold 0.835 p=0.01; ablation_LB_cv_auc log_freq_only=0.838, position_only=0.67, minus_log_freq=0.783 all match wp3_cv_recovery.json. Ablation already flags frequency dominance; RELATIVE_PHONOLOGY_ONLY on LA correct.
NULL (clustering at chance) consistent with wp3_cv_cluster.json; verdict semantics correct (needs labels, not a refutation of C/V).

base_rate 0.2477, raw-weight AUC 0.552, hub-norm AUC 0.714 match wp3_2_scribal_substitution.json. z=7.07 vs sweep p=0.0033 presentational gap correctly flagged. SIGNAL_VALIDATED(LB)/NO_POWER(LA) semantics correct.

max_weight ladder + 1.7x match wp3_2b_power_curve.json. UNDER-FLAG: the 'clean regime' is defined only on max_weight>=120; the curve's own discriminative metric weight_feature_auc is flat 0.568->0.579 across the WHOLE ladder (barely above chance) and never approaches the headline hub-norm 0.714. So '1.7x reaches the validated power regime' conflates a max_weight proxy with the validated-discrimination claim. P1 marks clean VERIFIED without this caveat.
sameV 1.15x/sameC 1.452x p=0.0033; LA 1 pair => NO_POWER. Correctly NO_POWER not refutation.
+0.7309 bits/word (LB); LA=recurrence artifact => NULL. Recurrence artifact correctly diagnosed; consistent with paper morphology NO-POWER null.
0.685->0.760 matches wp2_segmentation_lever.json. LATER-REFUTED marking correct (channel-dependent + rides the frequency-artifact position channel).

distributional R@5 0.071 vs null 0.066 reproduced from wp4_calibration.json (at-floor NULL); shape channel Fisher figure not verified as literal string but correctly labelled CONFOUNDED/circular, non-load-bearing. NULL semantics + <=0.75 cap correct.

Core CONFLICTING flag CORRECT (26 nominal-independent vs 2 held-out I,RI). MINOR provenance error: P1 says 'the REPORT overrides down to 2 via the frozen gate' but the 2 lives INSIDE the SAME wp5_anchor_inventory.json (frozen_empirical_held_out subfield, imported from the crossscript gate DOIs), not in the WP4_WP5 report text. TRIVIAL_RECOVERY semantics correct.
3-4 seeds->0.78-0.87, frequency-seeding fails, LA NULL consistent with wp5_reduced_seed_bootstrap.json. SIGNAL_VALIDATED(LB)/NULL(LA) + LATER-REFUTED marking correct.

4.9x/2620wf reproduced. ERROR in P1's primary_metric_value: it states 'monotone 0.647->0.752 over 539->13562' — the curve is NON-monotone within that very range (1500=0.6941 -> 2000=0.6804 drop; 10000=0.7563 -> 13562=0.752 drop) and the 13562 point is a single draw (n_effective_draws=1, sd=0). P1 DID flag the low-end (size 300) non-monotonicity and marks the row CONFLICTING overall, so the defect is contained, but the 'monotone over 539->13562' descriptor is factually wrong.
5-regime synthetic lab; LA-scale NO_POWER, ~1.88x + segmentation to recover; wrong-language at chance. QUANTIFIED semantics correct (not a discovery).

real 0.01339 nats/tok, family_S z=8.46 mean -0.0369, FWER_W=1.0 reproduced from wp6_agnostic_search_endtoend_null.json. AT_END_TO_END_NULL semantics correct (necessary-not-sufficient; W wrong-lang scores higher).
105->47, C/V enrichment z 2.59->-0.50 consistent with wp7_word_substitution_channel.json. REFUTED-of-'segmentation-is-uniform-win' correctly scoped (not a global refutation).
coverage-not-accuracy (recovers U; O mis-ranked) consistent with wp8_word_reduced_seed_cv.json. PARTIAL/NULL-validity + LATER-REFUTED marking correct.
WS 0.04214, control 0.01542, ANA 0.00411, only KU-RO survives — all reproduced from candidate_round1_results.json. Same-structure-artifact reading correct (not a language-fit).
Hurrian 0.03083, Luwian 0.00206 (TA-TI), control 0.00617 reproduced from candidate_round2_results.json. AT_END_TO_END_NULL correct.

Etruscan 0.03289 < control 0.05447, Aegean-isolate 0 held-out reproduced from candidate_round3_results.json. Broad-family-null correctly NOT stated as refuting-all-languages; clean control>real mechanism isolation correct.
5 manifests NO_CANDIDATE_TO_SEAL; correctly DESIGNED_NOT_RUN (not counted as an executed method). Prospective SEAL_5 hash present.
63 sources (25 on disk), 48 value-lineage-independent; INVENTORY_BUILT, correctly not a LA discovery. Single-source-through-GORILA honesty finding preserved.

step3_omissions.detail: No omitted verdict-bearing foundry method instance found. candidate_round1_wordunits.py / data/candidate_wordunits.json (973 multi-sign held-out tokens) is INPUT construction for the candidate rounds, not a separate result — correctly not a distinct instance. Helper scripts (candidate_engine.py, word_units.py, seal_common.py, wp7_cvcheck_patch.py) are infrastructure. All WP1-8 + lab + WP6 + 3 rounds + seals + sources are covered by FND-01..23.

The relative-phonology campaign (branch research/linear-a-relative-phonology-seals) that REFUTES foundry C1/seed-propagation is a SEPARATE scope (P1 instances_relative_phonology.json); correctly out of foundry inventory but correctly cross-referenced. Not an omission.

step3_duplicates_false_novelty.detail: No false-novelty duplicates. LB-positive-control + LA-null pairs (FND-04/06/08/09/13) are correctly recorded as SINGLE instances (one method, two corpora), not double-counted. FND-03 (atlas) marked PROPOSED_ONLY and FND-22 (seals) DESIGNED_NOT_RUN — proposals/infrastructure correctly NOT counted as executed LA methods. FND-23 (sources) is a source-audit, correctly meta not a LA method.

FND-16 (WP6 agnostic) and FND-19/20/21 (3 candidate rounds) all run the SAME candidate_engine.py + same S/W/R end-to-end null; they are distinct LANGUAGE hypotheses but ONE method. P1 discloses ('same engine as FND-19'). The FINAL_CAMPAIGN_REPORT's phrase 'replicated across six independent hypotheses' is a mild dependent-method-as-independent-replication risk, but P1 surfaces the shared engine, so not a material inventory error.

step3_numerical.detail: 'monotone 0.647->0.752 over 539->13562' contradicted by the same JSON (drops at 2000 and 13562; 13562 n=1). Point estimate 2620wf/4.9x rests on interpolation across a non-monotone noisy curve.

1.7x transcribed correctly, but 'validated power regime' is defined on max_weight>=120 while the curve's discriminative weight_feature_auc stays flat ~0.57 (never reaches the validated 0.714). Proxy-vs-metric conflation not caveated by P1.
z=7.07 (report) vs sweep p=0.0033 presentational gap — correctly flagged by P1.
R@5 0.071/null 0.066 reproduced; Fisher p 1.59e-5 and rank 48/89 not verified as literal strings but non-load-bearing (shape channel is CONFOUNDED/circular either way).

step3_verdict_semantics.detail: P1 handles verdict semantics correctly across foundry scope: NO_POWER (FND-06/08 LA) NOT stated as refutation; TRIVIAL_RECOVERY for the anchor inventory (FND-12, literature-recovery not discovery); WP1 theorem SCOPED not universalized as an impossibility theorem (FND-01); relative C/V classes NOT presented as absolute values (FND-04 RELATIVE_PHONOLOGY_ONLY); candidate-family nulls NOT stated as refuting-all-languages (FND-19/21); WP17 'segmentation-uniform-win' refutation correctly SCOPED to one channel.

The foundry's own headline framing (C1 value-blindness refuted / C2 more-corpus-helps / C3 value-layer-reopened) is a positive spin later NET-REVERSED by the same author's relative-phonology campaign (position->C/V = frequency artifact; value layer 'comprehensively closed on LA'). P1 correctly demotes the empirical legs (FND-02/04/10/13/18 LATER REFUTED) but the row-level scientific_outcome fields still carry the optimistic 'PARTIAL_SUPPORT/SUPPORTED-on-LB' language; a reader scanning only scientific_outcome (not supersession_relations) could over-read the standing state. P1 does capture the reversal in STATUS_CONTRADICTIONS + LINEAGES.

overall_assessment: P1's foundry inventory is accurate and thorough. All 23 instances map to real artifacts; every load-bearing number I traced REPRODUCED from the cited JSON. All three orchestrator-flagged conflicts are GENUINE and were already independently flagged by P1 (STATUS_CONTRADICTIONS.csv). position->C/V and reduced-seed are correctly marked SUPERSEDED/REFUTED, and the refuting artifact was verified to exist (relative-phonology @3c1ddab CV_ANALOGUE_REFUTED). Only two rows warrant minor correction (FND-14 false 'monotone' descriptor; FND-12 minor provenance wording) plus one under-flag (FND-07 max_weight-proxy vs validated-AUC). No fabricated instances, no omitted verdict-bearing method, no material false-novelty duplicate, no verdict-semantics inflation.
